generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
prefix base: http://example.org/base#
instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results for building performance analysis"
]
instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for future system behavior"
]
instance SystemStateMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of system states"
]
instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization recommendations for building operations"
]
instance DecisionMakingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven recommendations for infrastructure management"
]
instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization interface for monitoring and operating physical infrastructure"
]
instance BuildingSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates building performance under various conditions",
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]
instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predicts future building system behavior based on historical and real-time data",
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors real-time system states for Facility Managers",
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemStateMonitoringInsight, VisualizationInsight
]
instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizes building operations for energy efficiency and performance",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]
instance EnhancedDecisionMakingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides data-driven recommendations for infrastructure management",
    DTDFVocab:provides DecisionMakingInsight
]
instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering processes enriched BIM models into structured representations and automatically generates deployable DT artifacts",
    DTDFVocab:enables BuildingSimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, RealTimeMonitoringService, OptimizationService, EnhancedDecisionMakingService
]
instance BuildingTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor for monitoring building environmental conditions",
    DTDFVocab:producedData BuildingTemperatureData
]
instance BuildingHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Humidity sensor for monitoring building environmental conditions",
    DTDFVocab:producedData BuildingHumidityData
]
instance BuildingTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingTemperatureSensor,
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data stream"
]
instance BuildingHumidityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingHumiditySensor,
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data stream"
]
instance TemperatureDataRecord : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical temperature data records for analysis",
    DTDFVocab:fromData BuildingTemperatureData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering
]
instance HumidityDataRecord : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical humidity data records for analysis",
    DTDFVocab:fromData BuildingHumidityData,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering
]
instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator controlling HVAC systems in building"
]
instance BMSController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Building Management System controller managing building operations"
]
instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Building Information Model containing device modeling of sensors, actuators, and controllers",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ModelDrivenEngineering
]
instance DeployableArtifactsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Structured Digital Twin model generated from BIM via Model-Driven Engineering"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The lifecycle encompasses initial BIM-based device modeling (sensors, actuators, controllers), Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to structured representations and deployable artifacts, real-time data synchronization, interactive visualization for monitoring and control, and modular extension points enabling evolution through custom services integration. Role-based governance involves Building Control Engineers for modeling, Facility Managers for operation monitoring, and DT Engineers for service development."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Standardized extension points are utilized for modular architecture to integrate custom services and analytics. However, no specific industry standards, specifications, certification requirements, or interoperability frameworks are explicitly referenced in the document."
]
